requirement_topic.en: Senelec Grid Connection and CRSE Electricity-Sector Context
requirement_topic.zh: Senelec 并网与 CRSE 电力行业背景
requirement_topic.zht: Senelec 併網與 CRSE 電力行業背景

summary.en: Senegal charger sites should treat Senelec distribution connection, metering, protection, available capacity, earthing, civil works, tariff, and commissioning conditions as site approvals separate from product testing. CRSE regulates the electricity-sector framework, while Senelec is the practical utility counterparty for many grid-connection and service conditions.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔充电场站应将 Senelec 配电接入、计量、保护、可用容量、接地、土建、电价和调试条件视为独立于产品测试的现场批准。CRSE 监管电力行业框架，而 Senelec 在许多并网和供电服务条件中是实际公用事业对接方。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾充電場站應將 Senelec 配電接入、計量、保護、可用容量、接地、土建、電價和調試條件視為獨立於產品測試的現場批准。CRSE 監管電力行業框架，而 Senelec 在許多併網和供電服務條件中是實際公用事業對接方。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific distribution capacity and metering approval

summary.en: China charger files may include domestic grid-connection assumptions, GB/T 18487 protection functions, and site commissioning reports. These can support engineering review but do not replace Senelec capacity confirmation, metering arrangement, protection coordination, tariff treatment, or local commissioning acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩资料可能包含国内并网假设、GB/T 18487 保护功能和场站调试报告。这些可支持工程审查，但不能替代 Senelec 容量确认、计量安排、保护配合、电价处理或当地调试接受。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁資料可能包含國內併網假設、GB/T 18487 保護功能和場站調試報告。這些可支持工程審查，但不能替代 Senelec 容量確認、計量安排、保護配合、電價處理或當地調試接受。

gap.en: Prepare a Senegal site pack with single-line diagram, load study, transformer/cable ratings, harmonics and power-quality assumptions, earthing design, protection settings, metering layout, emergency isolation, and commissioning method statement for Senelec, owner, and installer review.
gap.zh: 应准备塞内加尔场站资料包，包括单线图、负荷研究、变压器/电缆额定值、谐波和电能质量假设、接地设计、保护定值、计量布局、紧急隔离和调试方法说明，以供 Senelec、业主和安装方审查。
gap.zht: 應準備塞內加爾場站資料包，包括單線圖、負荷研究、變壓器／電纜額定值、諧波和電能品質假設、接地設計、保護定值、計量佈局、緊急隔離和調試方法說明，以供 Senelec、業主和安裝方審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for any grid-connected site to the extent Senelec service, CRSE-regulated electricity rules, local permits, tariff conditions, or project-owner approvals apply
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic grid assumptions are informational for export and must be replaced by Senegal site-specific utility approval

source.publisher: Commission de Regulation du Secteur de l'Energie (CRSE), Senegal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product conformity does not grant a Senelec connection. Treat grid connection, metering, protection, and commissioning as a separate Senegal site-approval workstream.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品合格不等于取得 Senelec 接入。应将并网、计量、保护和调试作为单独的塞内加尔现场批准工作流处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品合格不等於取得 Senelec 接入。應將併網、計量、保護和調試作為單獨的塞內加爾現場批准工作流處理。
